title: Herobrine: A Friend
description: A mod that adds the myth himself, Herobrine as a friend!
body:
Herobrine: A Friend is a Minecraft mod designed to transform your solo gaming experience by introducing an unexpected companion, Herobrine. With this mod, you'll embark on unique adventures, explore mysterious dimensions, and engage with intriguing new mechanics, making your gameplay more exciting and immersive.

Key Features:
New Dimension: "Steve's Mind" Dive into the enigmatic world of Steve's consciousness, filled with unique challenges, secrets, and surprises. This dimension brings a surreal and thought-provoking twist to your Minecraft journey.

Unique Biome: "Steve's Biome" Discover a biome unlike any other, teeming with its own aesthetic, resources, and mysteries to uncover.

Custom Mobs Encounter two exclusive mobs:

Steve.exe: A glitch-inspired entity with unique behaviors and abilities.

Herobrine: Your loyal yet unpredictable friend, adding a dynamic element to your adventures.

New Crafting Recipes Experiment with innovative crafting options, including:

Mind Igniter: A key item to access "Steve's Mind" dimension.

Mutated Brain: A mind to make Herobrine.

How to Install:
Download the mod file.
Press Win+R and type %appdata%.
Open the .minecraft folder, then the mods folder.
Drag and drop the .JAR file of this mod into the mods folder.

Run Minecraft with the Forge/NeoForge Client.

Refer to the official docs for help: https://docs.google.com/document/d/19VsY0b7N60Al42f6MBN5sVGb38iFvJOSw8jac5VsPCg/edit?usp=sharing 

Note: Orignal file is hbaf1.2.3. hbaf1.2.5 for neoforge (1.21.8) is a recreation and may be different from the orignal in minor ways.
